note: Authored lessons. Each lesson's body lives at data/learn/lessons/<slug>.md. Quiz is inlined here so we don't need a YAML frontmatter parser. Tracks: claude-code, skills, mcp, finder, image-video, nocode, local.

lessons.title: Claude Code: zero to your first session
lessons.summary: Install, sign in, open a repo, make the first edit. The CLI walk-through.

quiz.q: Where does CLAUDE.md live for a project?
choices: In the project root, committed to git
quiz.why: Project-scoped CLAUDE.md sits in the repo root and ships with the codebase. .claude/settings.json is for settings/permissions, not instructions.

quiz.q: What does /compact do in an active Claude Code session?
choices: Summarizes prior context so the session can continue past its token budget
quiz.why: /compact rolls the earlier conversation into a summary — you keep working in the same session without hitting the token ceiling.

quiz.q: Which of these is NOT a good candidate for Claude Code vs. a chat UI?
choices: A one-line typo fix you already know the location of
Adding a new feature that touches the router, the UI, and the test suite
quiz.why: A one-line fix is faster to type than to describe. Reach for Claude Code when the work spans files or needs real context.
